title: Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks Icon's
description: An resource pack that changes the spell icons to more beautiful, higher resolution ones. (irons spells and spellbooks)
body:
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Required-Irons%20Spells%20n%20Spellbook-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=B446C6&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Firons-spells-n-spellbooks)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)

Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks Icon's
==================================


Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks Icon's is an **resource pack** that changes the spell icons to more beautiful, higher resolution ones.


![](https://imgur.com/f9aoOOj.png "Frost Spells")
